seo.title: Characom Group — Building Cyprus since 1987
seo.description: Cypriot construction and development group. Government infrastructure, real estate development and residential communities — built to outlast us, since 1987.

props.headline: We build what outlasts us.
props.subheadline: Government infrastructure, real estate and residential craft — delivered across Cyprus by one accountable team.

image.alt: Construction site at dusk with tower cranes over Cyprus

props.heading: Four decades of building Cyprus
props.body:
Characom Group began in 1987 as a two-crew contractor pouring foundations on the edge of Nicosia. Four decades later, the same discipline runs through everything we deliver — from motorway interchanges to seafront homes.

We keep development, engineering and construction under one roof. It is a slower way to build a company, and it is why clients return: a single team stays accountable from first survey to final handover.

Today more than 650 engineers, builders and craftspeople carry the group's standard across the island — build it once, build it right, build it to outlast us.

image.alt: Modern concrete building rising against the sky

props.heading: From ground to skyline
props.text: Every Characom project follows the same disciplined ascent — scroll to raise one of ours.
props.caption: Scroll to raise the tower

milestones.title: Founded in Nicosia
milestones.text: Andreas Characos registers the firm with two crews, one mixer truck and a ledger he still keeps.

milestones.title: First government contract
milestones.text: A district school extension in Larnaca opens the group's public-works record — 85 contracts and counting.

milestones.title: 500th home delivered
milestones.text: The Elaia courtyard scheme marks half a thousand Cypriot families housed by the group.

milestones.title: 1.2 million sq.m
milestones.text: Cumulative developed area passes 1.2 million square metres across all three sectors.

props.heading: Have a project in mind?
props.text: Tell us what you are planning — an engineer replies within two working days.
